title: Projective Empathy: Reading Your Marketing From the Buyer's Seat | Daniel Fox
meta_description: Projective empathy is the trained practice of inhabiting a buyer's value structure and reading your own marketing from inside it. A method by Daniel Fox, fractional B2C CMO, drawing on Spiral Dynamics.

@graph.name: Projective empathy
@graph.description: Projective empathy is the trained practice of inhabiting a buyer's value structure and reading a company's own marketing from inside it, drawing on Spiral Dynamics to hold several incompatible worldviews at once without collapsing them into your own.
